action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Non-food contact surface or equipment made of unacceptable material, not kept clean, or not properly sealed, raised, spaced or movable to allow accessibility for cleaning on all sides, above and underneath the unit.
No approved written standard operating procedure for avoiding contamination by refillable returnable containers.
Insufficient or no hot holding, cold storage or cold holding equipment provided to maintain Time/Temperature Control for Safety Foods (TCS) at required temperatures
Wiping cloths not stored clean and dry, or in a sanitizing solution, between uses.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: No approved written standard operating procedure for avoiding contamination by refillable returnable containers.
